thesis: ENPH is triggering a technical breakout above its 50DMA on heavy volume, fueled by sector rotation into solar and a potential short squeeze given its 21.6% short interest. The trade aims to capture a 4-8% momentum burst over the next 3 days before any earnings risk materializes.

RKLB momentum remains high as it tests the $78.6 breakout level ahead of the March 19 launch. The proximity to the target and the impending back-to-back launch catalysts (Mar 19 and Mar 24) sustain the 'flip-and-bank' thesis. A window extension is required to capture the expected gamma squeeze toward $90.

High-conviction breakout play centered on the March 18 earnings catalyst. Thesis shifts from a pre-earnings run to a volatility expansion play targeting the $500+ range, supported by robust AI-driven HBM demand and recent bullish analyst revisions.

TOST is exhibiting strong pre-earnings momentum with call volume 3x normal and an RSI breakout. The setup anticipates a 4-7% pop on the March 20 earnings release driven by strong restaurant POS demand tailwinds.

CVX is exhibiting strong relative momentum (+7.5% 1M) as capital aggressively rotates into Energy during a risk-off correction. A breakout above its 52-week high offers a clean, verified 1-5 day momentum setup.
